articles.description: Tesla CEO Elon Musk reportedly proposes buying Twitter for $54.20 per share, sending Dogecoin (DOGE) price soaring 10%.

articles.title: DOGE up 8% as Elon Musk makes new acquisition offer for Twitter
articles.description: Trading has halted on Twitter as Elon Musk has reportedly reissued his original offer of $54.20 per share to buy the company.

articles.title: DogeCoin Surges 8% On News That Elon Musk Will Buy Twitter
articles.description: Tesla Inc. Chief Executive Elon Musk is proposing to buy Twitter Inc. for $25 billion, or $54.20 a share, Bloomberg and other media outlets have reported. The proposal was submitted in a letter to Twitter’s board of directors, according to people familiar with the matter who asked not to be identified discussing confidential information. Twitter shares rose as much as 18% on the news, after trading was briefly halted. Musk’s frustrations with Twitter date to April, when he agreed to […]

articles.title: Tornado Cash Sees Drop In Activity After U.S. Treasury Sanctions – What Now For TORN?
articles.description: The value of Tornado Cash is decreasing, not due to market factors but because of recent controversies. The Office of Foreign Assets Control recently added Tornado Cash to its list of Special Designated Nationals. That means no one from the United States may use the token. By taking this action, OFAC has effectively banned Tornado Cash from participating in one of the most important...
